ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "subject_id" TEXT /* ID of the subject participating in the experiment */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run or session of the experiment */,
  "block_id" INTEGER /* ID of the block within the experiment */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial within the experiment */,
  "condition_id" TEXT /* ID of the condition of the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the experiment was last updated */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of the experiment (e.g., behavioral, neuroimaging) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the experiment */,
  "researcher_id" TEXT /* ID of the researcher who created the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_id") REFERENCES blocks ("block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the subject */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the subject */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the subject information was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the subject information was last updated */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the subject */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the subject */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the subject */,
  "institute" TEXT /* Institution the subject is affiliated with */,
  "consent_form" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the subject has signed the consent form */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each run */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the run belongs to */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the run */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the run */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the run information was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the run information was last updated */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the run was conducted */,
  "researcher_id" TEXT /* ID of the researcher who conducted the run */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the block belongs to */,
  "block_name" TEXT /* Name of the block */,
  "block_description" TEXT /* Description of the block */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the block information was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the block information was last updated */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the block in minutes */,
  "researcher_id" TEXT /* ID of the researcher who created the block */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the block */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "block_id" INTEGER /* ID of the block the trial belongs to */,
  "trial_name" TEXT /* Name of the trial */,
  "trial_description" TEXT /* Description of the trial */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the trial information was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the trial information was last updated */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the trial in seconds */,
  "researcher_id" TEXT /* ID of the researcher who created the trial */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the condition belongs to */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the condition information was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the condition information was last updated */,
  "researcher_id" TEXT /* ID of the researcher who created the condition */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the response belongs to */,
  "subject_id" TEXT /* ID of the subject who made the response */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the response belongs to */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Time it took for the subject to make the response */,
  "response_accuracy" INTEGER /* Accuracy of the response */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the response information was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the response information was last updated */,
  "researcher_id" TEXT /* ID of the researcher who recorded the response */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stimuli" (
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stimulus */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the stimulus belongs to */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the stimulus belongs to */,
  "stimulus_name" TEXT /* Name of the stimulus */,
  "stimulus_description" TEXT /* Description of the stimulus */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the stimulus information was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the stimulus information was last updated */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the stimulus (e.g., visual, auditory) */,
  "researcher_id" TEXT /* ID of the researcher who created the stimulus */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the stimulus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stimulus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stimuli_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stimuli_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stimulus_presentations" (
  "stimulus_presentation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stimulus presentation */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the stimulus presentation belongs to */,
  "subject_id" TEXT /* ID of the subject who was presented the stimulus */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the stimulus presentation belongs to */,
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stimulus presented */,
  "presentation_time" REAL /* Time when the stimulus was presented */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the stimulus presentation information was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the stimulus presentation information was last updated */,
  "researcher_id" TEXT /* ID of the researcher who conducted the stimulus presentation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the stimulus presentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stimulus_presentation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stimulus_presentations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stimulus_presentations_stimulus_id FOREIGN KEY ("stimulus_id") REFERENCES stimuli ("stimulus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stimulus_presentations_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stimulus_presentations_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "choices" (
  "choice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each choice */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the choice belongs to */,
  "subject_id" TEXT /* ID of the subject who made the choice */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the choice belongs to */,
  "choice_time" REAL /* Time it took for the subject to make the choice */,
  "choice_accuracy" INTEGER /* Accuracy of the choice */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the choice information was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the choice information was last updated */,
  "researcher_id" TEXT /* ID of the researcher who recorded the choice */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the choice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("choice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_choices_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_choices_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_choices_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "choice_options" (
  "choice_option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each choice option */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the choice option belongs to */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the choice option belongs to */,
  "choice_option_name" TEXT /* Name of the choice option */,
  "choice_option_description" TEXT /* Description of the choice option */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the choice option information was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the choice option information was last updated */,
  "researcher_id" TEXT /* ID of the researcher who created the choice option */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the choice option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("choice_option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_choice_options_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_choice_options_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "choice_presentations" (
  "choice_presentation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each choice presentation */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the choice presentation belongs to */,
  "subject_id" TEXT /* ID of the subject who was presented the choice */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the choice presentation belongs to */,
  "choice_option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the choice option presented */,
  "presentation_time" REAL /* Time when the choice was presented */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the choice presentation information was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the choice presentation information was last updated */,
  "researcher_id" TEXT /* ID of the researcher who conducted the choice presentation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the choice presentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("choice_presentation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_choice_presentations_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_choice_presentations_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_choice_presentations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_choice_presentations_choice_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("choice_option_id") REFERENCES choice_options ("choice_option_id")
)
